creator: bsdport@ddm.wox.org
text:
On Fri, Oct 19, 2001 at 10:43:29AM +0200, Matthias Andree wrote:
> I cannot see how and why a "maintainer" update sticks with an old version,
> although a CURRENT PR exists: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=31104

Then you don't know how the PR system works wrt non-committers.
ports/30943 was submitted the day after 1.2.11 was released.  I never
saw PR 31104 (it was never CCed to me and it was also mis-filed).

I did however submitted the exact same patch as a followup to
ports/30943 on Oct 7, the day 1.2.11.1 was released.  gnats seemed to
have lost it however.
-- 
Dave Chapeskie
